eng.definition: Generous or forgiving, especially towards a rival or less powerful person.
examples: He was magnanimous in his victory, praising his opponent's effort.
Despite the hurt, she was magnanimous and forgave her friend.
The magnanimous gesture was appreciated by everyone.
यह अविश्वसनीय है कि वह इतनी जल्दी काम कर गया।
उसके द्वारा किया गया कार्य अविश्वसनीय था।
उसकी कहानी सुनकर मुझे अविश्वसनीय लगा।
